description: Colour block styling on this Linos Perros wallet in pista green and mustard yellow. Match one item in your ensemble with either of these colours to bag that colour block trend. Yellow inner.Length: 17.5 cmWidth: 9.5 cmDepth: 0.5 cmNarrow flap with button closure; branding on the buttonFive card slots and a pocket on the left fold and three card slots and a photo id holder on the right Four card slots on the centre flap and an id holder on the other sideFloral patterned liningOne zippered pocket at the backEmbossed branding on the frontCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
